_comment: Bundled fallback list of Claude Code built-in slash commands. Used by src-tauri/src/claude/discovery.rs ONLY when live discovery fails (claude --print returns no JSON AND --help yields no /command tokens). Live discovery always wins when it works, so this file does not need to track every Claude release perfectly. Update on each h-ide release if Claude adds notable new commands.

commands.description: Show Claude Code's built-in command help
Show token usage and estimated cost
Initialize a CLAUDE.md for this project
Run diagnostics on your Claude install
Ask Claude to review the current diff
Toggle Vim editing mode for the prompt
